entities.name: BARLEY
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for genetic mapping in Australia

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the barley genetic maps were developed

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Representations of the relative positions of genes and markers on chromosomes

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers to select for desired traits in breeding programs

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of genetic marker consisting of short tandem repeats

entities.name: INDEL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers based on insertions or deletions in the DNA sequence

entities.name: DATABASE MINING
entities.description: The process of extracting markers from existing sequence databases

entities.name: EXPRESSED SEQUENCE TAG
entities.description: Short sub-sequences of a cDNA sequence used to identify genes

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of comparing the genomic sequences of different species to identify conserved regions

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop used as a reference for comparative genome analysis with barley

entities.name: GENOMIC LIBRARY SCREENING
entities.description: The process of searching a genomic library using specific probes to find markers

entities.name: EST-SSR
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers derived from expressed sequence tags

entities.name: GENOMIC SSR
entities.description: Simple sequence repeat markers derived from genomic DNA libraries

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The occurrence of multiple forms of a DNA sequence at a specific locus

entities.name: DOUBLED HAPLOID
entities.description: A population of plants with a homozygous genetic makeup used for mapping

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population of plants created by crossing and selfing to map genetic traits

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: The thread-like structures of nucleic acids and protein found in the nucleus

entities.name: RECOMBINATION FRACTIONS
entities.description: The frequency of recombination between two genetic markers

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist or tolerate a pathogen

entities.name: CEREAL CYST NEMATODE
entities.description: A parasitic nematode that causes disease in cereal crops

entities.name: SPOT FORM OF NET BLOTCH
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting the leaves of barley

entities.name: LEAF SCALD
entities.description: A fungal disease that causes lesions on barley leaves

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genetic markers to select for specific traits

relationships.description: Study conducted on barley in Australia
Barley is the subject of the genetic maps
Genetic maps are used to identify markers for molecular breeding
SSR markers were added to the barley genetic maps
Indel markers were added to the barley genetic maps
Database mining was used to develop EST-SSR markers
EST-SSR markers are derived from EST sequences
Comparative genome analysis was performed on barley
Comparative genome analysis was performed between barley and rice
Genomic library screening was used to develop genomic SSR markers
EST-SSR markers were screened for polymorphism
Genomic SSR markers were screened for polymorphism
Polymorphism was screened in doubled haploid populations
Polymorphism was screened in recombinant inbred line populations
Genetic maps provide coverage across barley chromosomes
Recombination fractions were used to re-evaluate marker order on maps
Some EST-SSR markers are linked to disease resistance genes
Some genomic SSR markers are linked to disease resistance genes
Disease resistance is targeted against cereal cyst nematode
Disease resistance is targeted against spot form of net blotch
Disease resistance is targeted against leaf scald
Disease resistance is a target trait for marker-assisted breeding
